use_cases: Hero section background with flowing molten visual effect
Portfolio or creative website artistic backdrop
Loading or transition screen with animated shader
Gaming or entertainment platform visual effects
ai_summary: A WebGL shader component using Three.js that renders a dynamic molten lava effect through FBM noise and time-based animation. The shader combines multiple noise layers for organic fluid motion with customizable theme support. Designed as an immersive visual backdrop for hero sections or creative portfolios.
